title: Jam tart with matured cheddar cheese
excerpt: Now look here, Jenny taught me a thing. This is now one of my favourite tarts in the whole world.

seo.title: Jam tart with matured cheddar cheese - Marinda Kook

html: Now look here, Jenny taught me a thing.  This is now one of my favourite tarts in the whole world.

recipe.title: Jam tart with matured cheddar cheese
recipe.author: Marinda Engelbrecht

items: 100 g butter, ice cold and cut into cubes

steps: Sift the flour and icing sugar into a mixing bowl.
Rub the butter in with your fingers until it looks like wet sand.
Whisk the egg yolk and ice cold water in a cup.
Make a well in the middle of the flour and work in the egg mixture until it forms a dough.
Shape the dough into a ball and cover with cling wrap. Leave it in the fridge for at least 30 minutes
Set aside a quarter of the dough to grate on top later. Roll out the rest of the dough on a surface lightly dusted with flour.
Lift it over the rolling pin and let it slide into a greased loose-bottomed tart pan.
Press the dough down with your hands and trim off the edges.
Put it back in the fridge for an hour.
Blind bake the tart shell at 190 °C for 10 minutes.
Spread the jam in the tart shell and grate the remaining dough on top.   Bake for 30 minutes, or until the jam in the tart shell has set.
Enjoy it with matured cheddar cheese.
